title_tag: Ngor Surf House in Senegal | Surf Camp Stay
meta_description: Stay at Ngor Surf House in Senegal near Dakar's best waves. Comfortable rooms, surf atmosphere and easy access to Ngor Island surf spots.
hero_subtitle: A relaxed surf stay in Ngor, close to Dakar's most consistent waves and the laid-back rhythm of Senegal's coast.
intro: Ngor Surf House is the perfect base for surfers looking to stay near the best surf spots in Dakar, Senegal. Set in the heart of Ngor, this welcoming surf house combines comfort, local character and easy access to the ocean, making it ideal for solo travelers, friends and surf holidays with a true Senegalese vibe.

sections.h2: Stay Close to the Best Surf Spots in Ngor
sections.content: Ngor Surf House puts you in a prime location for surfing in Senegal, with quick access to the famous waves around Ngor Island and the Dakar peninsula. Whether you are planning a dedicated surf trip or simply want a comfortable place to stay by the sea, the house offers a practical and friendly base for your adventure.
bullets: Located in Ngor, near Dakar's top surf spots
Easy access to Ngor Island and surrounding waves

sections.content: Designed for travelers who want a simple, welcoming and surf-focused stay, Ngor Surf House offers a relaxed atmosphere where you can rest, recharge and enjoy life by the ocean. It is a great choice for surfers who want comfort, convenience and an authentic local setting during their time in Senegal.
bullets: Comfortable accommodation for surfers and travelers
Relaxed, friendly atmosphere in a local neighborhood

sections.h2: A Great Base for Your Surf Holiday
sections.content: From early morning surf checks to easy returns after a day in the water, Ngor Surf House is made for surf travel. Its location and atmosphere make it easy to enjoy the waves, discover the area and experience the unique energy of Ngor and Dakar.
bullets: Ideal for surf holidays in Senegal
Convenient base to explore Dakar and the coast

cta_heading: Book Your Stay at Ngor Surf House
cta_text: Ready to surf Senegal and stay close to the action? Contact Ngor Surfcamp Teranga to plan your stay at Ngor Surf House and enjoy an unforgettable surf trip in Dakar.
og_title: Ngor Surf House in Senegal | Stay Near Dakar Surf
og_description: Discover Ngor Surf House, a comfortable surf stay in Senegal near Dakar's best waves and Ngor Island.
